core.slogan: Habiskan waktu untuk berkembang, bukan memproses pesanan.
core.value_proposition: Portal pemesanan yang membuat bisnis ekspor Anda terlihat kelas dunia.

hero.title: Habiskan waktu untuk berkembang,
hero.subtitle: Berikan pelanggan Anda portal pemesanan profesional. Lihat pesanan mengalir masuk. Fokus pada yang penting.

items.title: Thread email tanpa akhir
items.description: Pelanggan email pesanan. Anda copy ke Excel. Mereka minta perubahan. Anda update. Mereka minta lagi. Berulang terus.

items.title: Excel di mana-mana
items.description: Daftar harga, formulir pesanan, invoice... semua di file Excel berbeda. Satu kesalahan copy-paste dan masalah muncul.

items.title: Pertanyaan sama, setiap hari
items.description: 'Berapa harga X?' 'Berapa MOQ-nya?' 'Apakah Y ada stok?' Tim Anda menjawab pertanyaan yang sama berulang-ulang.

items.title: Dokumen memakan waktu lama
items.description: Invoice proforma, invoice komersial, packing list... dibuat manual untuk setiap pesanan.

solution.section_subtitle: ExportFlow memberikan pelanggan Anda portal pemesanan profesional. Mereka pesan sendiri. Anda fokus pada pertumbuhan.

benefits.title: Portal dengan brand Anda sendiri
benefits.description: Logo Anda, warna Anda, domain Anda. Pelanggan melihat toko profesional, bukan email yang tersebar.

benefits.title: Pesanan masuk, dokumen keluar
benefits.description: Pelanggan pesan. Invoice, proforma, dan packing list dibuat otomatis.

benefits.title: Bekerja dalam bahasa apa pun
benefits.description: Portal Anda dalam bahasa Inggris untuk pelanggan, dashboard dalam bahasa Cina untuk tim Anda. Semua senang.

benefits.title: Harga berbeda untuk pelanggan berbeda
benefits.description: Distributor melihat harga distributor. Retailer melihat harga retail. Otomatis.

steps.title: Import produk Anda
steps.description: Upload daftar produk Excel Anda. Kami akan mengorganisirnya menjadi katalog yang indah.

steps.title: Undang pelanggan Anda
steps.description: Kirim link portal ke mereka. Mereka buat akun dalam 30 detik.

steps.title: Lihat pesanan mengalir masuk
steps.description: Pelanggan browse, pesan, dan Anda dapat notifikasi. Dokumen dibuat otomatis.

items.quote: Sebelum ExportFlow, tim saya menghabiskan berjam-jam menerjemahkan pesanan Excel ke bahasa Cina untuk produksi. Sekarang ExportFlow melakukannya untuk kami! Tidak ada lagi copy-paste untuk membuat invoice dan dokumen ekspor. Pelanggan kami memesan langsung melalui portal mereka. Seperti punya karyawan tambahan.
items.author: Sarah Chen
items.title: Manajer Operasional

items.quote: Pelanggan grosir saya dulu menelepon atau email untuk memesan, dan saya mengirim balik invoice yang dibuat di Excel. Sekarang saya hanya melihat pesanan masuk dan menangani yang perlu perhatian khusus. Akhirnya saya bisa fokus mencari pelanggan baru.
items.author: Michael Wang
items.title: Direktur Ekspor

items.quote: Pelanggan kami dulu email menanyakan harga, MOQ, spesifikasi... Kami menghabiskan berjam-jam menjawab pertanyaan yang sama. Sekarang semuanya ada di portal mereka. Mereka browse, pesan, kami produksi. Simpel.
items.author: David Liu
items.title: Manajer Penjualan

items.quote: Ketika kami mengirim link portal pemesanan ke pelanggan, mereka terkesan. Mereka bilang 'ini terlihat seperti sistem Fortune 500'. Kami hanya 15 orang, tapi sekarang terlihat kelas dunia. ExportFlow balik modal di bulan pertama.
items.author: Mehmet Yılmaz
items.title: Pendiri

items.quote: Dulu, menambah pelanggan berarti harus menambah staf. Sekarang tim kami yang berisi 4 orang menangani pekerjaan yang dulu butuh 10 orang. Portal yang melakukan pekerjaan beratnya.
items.author: Priya Sharma
items.title: COO
items.highlight: Tim 4 orang menangani yang dulu butuh 10.

pricing.section_subtitle: 14-day free trial with personalized onboarding. Save 15% with annual billing.
pricing.price_tiers_description: Set different price levels for different customer types. Assign each customer to a tier, and they automatically see their prices in the portal.
pricing.price_tiers_example: Example: Widget A → Distributor €10 | Retailer €12.50 | VIP €15
pricing.guarantee_text: Not satisfied? Get a full refund within 30 days. No questions asked.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes! Try any plan free for 14 days. We'll personally help you set up your portal. No credit card required.

faq.question: Can I switch plans anytime?
faq.answer: Yes, upgrade or downgrade anytime. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit cards and PayPal. Annual plans can also pay by bank transfer.

faq.question: What are custom requests (Enterprise)?
faq.answer: Small customizations like adding a field, modifying a PDF template, or creating a simple report. Not major features or integrations.

features.page_title: Everything you need to manage export orders
features.page_subtitle: From product catalog to shipping documents, ExportFlow handles it all.

features_list.title: Branded Ordering Portal
features_list.description: Your customers get their own professional portal with your logo, colors, and domain. They browse your catalog, see their prices, and place orders 24/7.

features_list.title: Smart Product Catalog
features_list.description: Upload your Excel and we organize it into a beautiful, searchable catalog. Products with images, specs, MOQs, and stock levels.

features_list.title: Flexible Pricing (Price Tiers)
features_list.description: Different customers see different prices. Distributors, retailers, VIPs - each sees only their negotiated prices.

features_list.title: Order Management
features_list.description: All orders in one place. Track status, make modifications, handle substitutions. Your team works together seamlessly.

features_list.title: Automatic Documents
features_list.description: Proforma invoices, commercial invoices, packing lists - generated automatically from every order. No more manual document creation.

features_list.title: Multi-Language Support
features_list.description: Your portal in English, French, Spanish for customers. Your dashboard in Chinese for your team. Everyone works in their language.

contact.page_subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you.

signup.title: Start your free trial
signup.subtitle: 14 days free. No credit card required.
signup.login_link: Already have an account? Sign in

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your ExportFlow account
login.signup_link: Don't have an account? Start free trial

about.title: Built by exporters, for exporters
about.story: ExportFlow was born from frustration. After years of managing thousands of orders through scattered Excel files and endless email threads, our founder knew there had to be a better way. Late nights reconciling orders, customers asking 'did you receive my order?', documents created manually one by one... ExportFlow is the tool we wished existed.
about.short_story: Built by an exporter who was tired of Excel chaos and email overload.
about.location: Based in France. Serving exporters worldwide.
about.mission: Our mission: help export businesses look professional, save time, and focus on growth.
